## Checklist

- [ ] Scope matches exactly one PR from the phase spec (out-of-scope findings → `specs/backlog.md`)
- [ ] Tests cover the new behaviour; coverage gate (90%) passes
- [ ] If `packages/engine` changed: no lookahead, deterministic, reviewed by `engine-guardian`
- [ ] Acceptance criteria from the spec are met — all of them
